bullets: CarGurus Q1 data (Apr 7): New EV listing views +31% vs Q4 2025; used EV listing views +40% vs Q4 2025.
mobile.de (Germany): EV search share tripled from 12% to 36%; dealer enquiries for used EVs +66% vs February.
CommBank EV purchase loan approvals +161% MoM (March vs February); NAB EV loans +100% MoM. Loan approvals are higher-conviction signals than search metrics.
Polestar UK test drive bookings tripled since Feb 28. Kia UK test drive requests +84% YoY.

EV-supportive policy across 12+ markets since Mar 15: Cambodia scrapped EV import duties (35% to 0% Apr 1); Pakistan PAVE subsidy received 270K applications (7x first-phase target). Laos, Spain, Germany, France, S. Korea, UK, Vietnam, Canada also enacted EV-supportive policy.
Markets where March EV sales appear to break pre-existing trend: France (+69% YoY), Sweden (+30% YoY), Australia (+94.7% YoY), New Zealand (+278% YoY).
